tools.name: spawn_actor
tools.description: Spawn an actor in the current level at a specified location and rotation. Can spawn built-in classes or Blueprint actors by content path.

class.description: Actor class name (StaticMeshActor, PointLight, DirectionalLight, CameraActor, PlayerStart) or Blueprint content path (e.g. /Game/Blueprints/BP_MyActor)

tools.name: place_light
tools.description: Place a light actor in the current level.

tools.name: modify_world_settings
tools.description: Modify World Settings for the current level. Can set the GameMode override, kill Z, default pawn class, and other world properties.

game_mode_override.description: Blueprint content path or class name for the GameMode override, e.g. /Game/Blueprints/BP_MyGameMode

default_pawn_class.description: Blueprint content path or class name for the default pawn class

kill_z.description: Kill Z value — actors below this Z coordinate are destroyed
